name: extract-pdf-compdf
tagline: ClawHub (98★): Extract PDF extracts structured data from PDFs and images, including tables, OCR text, images, and stamps, built on ComPDF d
verdict: Main issue: the description frames this narrowly as extraction/export, but the body catalog covers much broader PDF-editing tasks than advertised — a scope mismatch worth knowing before you rely on it staying in its lane. It also gives no out-of-scope guidance and no real version tracking, only a vendor copyright year.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in the description or body, despite the skill's very broad 'When to Run' list (convert, merge, split, waterma
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the file; only a copyright year range for the vendor company, which is not a versioning s
